get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of articles with optional filters for category, language, status, and search.

post.description: Creates a new article with media URLs. The article must belong to a category and match its language.
Creates multiple articles in a single request. Executed serially. Useful for data seeding.

put.description: Updates an existing article with all its details including media URLs and metadata.

delete.description: Deletes an article and all its associated media files from storage.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific article using category slug and article slug.
Retrieves a paginated list of audios with optional filters for category, language, status, and search.

post.description: Creates a new audio with media URLs. The audio must belong to a category and match its language.

put.description: Updates an existing audio with all its details, including media URLs.

delete.description: Deletes an audio and all its associated media files from storage.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific audio using category slug and audio slug.

post.description: Authenticates a user with email and password, returns JWT access token and refresh token.
Registers a new user account with username, email, and password. A confirmation email will be sent.
Generates a new access token using a valid refresh token.
Revokes the refresh token and logs out the user.
Confirms a user's email address using the confirmation token sent via email.
Sends a password reset email to the user if the email exists in the system.
Resets the user's password using the reset token sent via email.
Changes the authenticated user's password. Requires current password for verification.

get.description: Retrieves a list of parent categories with optional filters for language and active status. Supports sorting by name or order. Sub-categories are included only if WithSub is true.

post.description: Creates a new category. Name and slug must match the specified language. Parent category must be a top-level category (not a sub-category). Order must be unique for parent categories in the same language, or unique among siblings for sub-categories.

get.summary: Get categories hierarchy for bulk upload
get.description: Retrieves all categories grouped by language with their subcategories and IDs. Used for bulk post upload feature.
Retrieves detailed information about a specific category by its slug. Use WithSub query parameter to include sub-categories.

put.description: Updates an existing category. Cannot change language if category has sub-categories or posts. Name must match the language. Order must remain unique.

delete.description: Deletes a category. Cannot delete categories that have sub-categories or posts.

post.description: Creates a new contact message. Requires authentication. Regular users only.

get.description: Retrieves all contact messages with pagination, search, and date range filters. Requires CommentsAndContactMessages permission.
Retrieves a specific contact message by its ID. Requires CommentsAndContactMessages permission.

delete.description: Deletes a contact message by ID. Requires CommentsAndContactMessages permission.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of galleries with optional filters for category, language, status, and search.

post.description: Creates a new gallery with multiple images. The gallery must belong to a category and match its language.

put.description: Updates an existing gallery with all its details including images and items.

delete.description: Deletes a gallery and all its associated items.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific gallery using category slug and gallery slug.

post.description: Uploads an image file to the media library. Maximum size: 10 MB. Rate limit: 5 per minute, 50 per hour.
Uploads a file to the media library. Maximum size: 50 MB. Rate limit: 5 per minute, 50 per hour.
Uploads a video file to the media library. Maximum size: 500 MB. Rate limit: 2 per minute, 10 per hour.
Uploads an audio file to the media library. Maximum size: 100 MB. Rate limit: 3 per minute, 30 per hour.
Uploads a reel video file (1-90 seconds) to the media library. Maximum size: 500 MB. Rate limit: 2 per minute, 10 per hour.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all media files. Use Type parameter to filter (Image=1, File=2, Video=3, Audio=4).

delete.description: Deletes a media file from storage using its URL.

get.description: Get the current status and progress of a media upload by its upload ID.

post.description: Cancel a pending or processing media upload. Cannot cancel completed uploads.

get.summary: Get all menu links with pagination
get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of menu links with optional filters for language, visibility, and parent link.

post.description: Creates a new menu link. MenuOrder must be unique per language across Pages and MenuLinks.

get.description: Retrieves a single menu link by its unique identifier.

put.description: Updates an existing menu link. MenuOrder must remain unique per language across Pages and MenuLinks.

delete.description: Deletes a menu link. Cannot delete links that have children.

get.description: Get available parent links for dropdown (only parent-level items)

put.description: Reorders menu items based on provided order information

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of pages with optional filters for language, location, visibility, and parent. Supports search and sorting.

post.description: Creates a new page. Title and slug must be unique per language. Parent can only be set if Location is MainMenu. Only one parent (MenuLink or Page) is allowed.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific page by its ID.

put.description: Updates an existing page. Title and slug must remain unique per language. Changing Location from MainMenu clears parent. Circular references are prevented.

delete.description: Soft deletes a page by setting Visibility to false. Cannot delete pages that have child pages.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific page by its slug and language.
Retrieves available parent options (MenuLinks and Pages) for a specific language. Used for dropdown in page creation/editing.
Retrieves pages for a specific location and language. Optionally includes hidden pages.

put.description: Updates the parent of a page. Page must have Location = MainMenu. Only one parent (MenuLink or Page) is allowed. Circular references are prevented.
Updates the menu order for multiple pages in bulk.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of posts (articles, videos, galleries, sorted lists) with optional filters for type, category, language, status, and search.
Retrieves a paginated list of posts that the authenticated user has liked. Only returns published posts, sorted by published date in descending order.

put.description: Updates common properties shared across all post types including title, slug, description, image, category, tags, status, language, and feature flags. This endpoint does not modify type-specific properties such as article content, video URLs, or gallery items.

post.description: Allows an authenticated user to like a post. The user must be logged in and cannot like the same post twice.

delete.description: Allows an authenticated user to remove their like from a post. The user must be logged in and must have previously liked the post.

post.description: Increments the view count for a specific post. This endpoint can be called when a user views a post.

get.summary: Download CSV template for bulk upload
get.description: Downloads an empty CSV template file with headers for bulk post upload.

get.summary: Download CSV example for bulk upload
get.description: Downloads a CSV example file with sample data for bulk post upload.
Retrieves field documentation for CSV bulk upload including data types, requirements, and examples.

post.description: Uploads multiple posts (articles/videos) from a CSV file. Returns summary with success/failure counts and error details.

get.summary: Get reels feed with infinite scrolling
get.description: Retrieves a cursor-based paginated feed of published reels (like Instagram/TikTok). Use 'NextCursor' from response for next page. Optimized for infinite scrolling with no performance degradation.

post.description: Creates a new reel with a video URL (must be uploaded via /api/v1/media/upload-reel first). Video must be 1-90 seconds. Requires AddReels permission.
Allows an authenticated user to like a reel. The user must be logged in and cannot like the same reel twice.

delete.description: Allows an authenticated user to remove their like from a reel. The user must be logged in and must have previously liked the reel.

put.description: Updates a reel's video URL, caption, or tags. Only the reel owner or an admin can update a reel. Video URL must be uploaded via /api/v1/media/upload-reel first.

delete.description: Deletes a reel. Only the reel owner or an admin can delete a reel.

post.description: Increments the view count for a specific reel. This endpoint can be called when a user views a reel.
Creates a new role with specified permissions. Cannot create default roles (Admin, Author, Moderator, Member).

get.description: Retrieves all roles with pagination and optional filtering.
Retrieves a role by its ID with all permissions.

put.description: Updates a role's name and permissions. Cannot update default roles.

delete.description: Deletes a role. Cannot delete default roles or roles with assigned users.

get.description: Retrieves general settings for a specific language.

put.description: Updates general settings for a specific language. Admin only.

get.description: Retrieves logo settings for a specific language.

put.description: Updates logo settings for a specific language. Supports file uploads. Admin only.

get.description: Retrieves contact settings for a specific language.

put.description: Updates contact settings for a specific language. Admin only.

get.description: Retrieves social media settings for a specific language.

put.description: Updates social media settings for a specific language. Admin only.

get.description: Retrieves cookies warning settings for a specific language.

put.description: Updates cookies warning settings for a specific language. Admin only.

get.description: Retrieves custom header and footer codes for a specific language.

put.description: Updates custom header and footer codes for a specific language. Admin only.

get.description: Retrieves maintenance mode settings for a specific language.

put.description: Updates maintenance mode settings for a specific language. Supports image upload. Admin only.

get.summary: Get paginated list of sorted lists
get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of sorted lists with optional filters for category, language, status, and search.

post.description: Creates a new sorted list with multiple items. The sorted list must belong to a category and match its language.

put.description: Updates an existing sorted list with all its details including items.

delete.description: Deletes a sorted list and all its associated items.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific sorted list using category slug and sorted list slug.
Retrieves a paginated list of tags with optional filters for language and search. Supports sorting by name or posts count.

post.description: Creates multiple tags at once. Each tag must have a unique name per language. Returns the list of created tags with their IDs.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific tag including its posts count.

put.description: Updates an existing tag's name and language. Cannot change language if the tag is already assigned to posts.

delete.description: Deletes a tag. Cannot delete tags that are assigned to posts.

get.description: Retrieves the latest ChiefEditor's name and avatar URL. Accessible to anonymous users.
Retrieves a user's public profile information by username including their published posts, social accounts, and bio. Accessible to anonymous users.
Retrieves the authenticated user's complete profile information including social accounts, email, and all editable fields.
Retrieves a paginated list of all users with their basic information, role, and status. Requires Users permission.

post.description: Creates a new user account with username, email, password, and role. Sends email confirmation. Requires Users permission.
Deactivates a user account, preventing them from accessing the system. Requires Users permission.
Reactivates a previously banned user account, allowing them to access the system again. Requires Users permission.

put.description: Changes a user's role. Cannot change admin roles or your own role. Revokes all user's refresh tokens. Requires RolesAndPermissions permission.

post.description: Manually confirms a user's email address without requiring email verification token. Requires Users permission.

put.description: Updates a user's profile information including username, slug, about me, avatar image, and social accounts. Avatar image is validated with magic bytes for security. Users with Users permission can update any user. Regular users can only update their own profile.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a user account and all associated data. Requires Users permission. Cannot delete yourself or admin users.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of videos with optional filters for category, language, status, and search.

post.description: Creates a new video with media URLs. The video must belong to a category and match its language.

put.description: Updates an existing video with all its details including media URLs and metadata.

delete.description: Deletes a video and all its associated media files from storage.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific video using category slug and video slug.
